text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Tokyo Daishoten is here, and Oi
Racecourse is looking livelier than usual!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Smart Falcon has really caught my eye!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Same. This is my first dirt race. Wonder how she
looks when she's running. I already know she's
super cute onstage!

text_block_list.name: Falco Fan A
text_block_list.text: Hey, it's Falco! Good luck!

text_block_list.name: Falco Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I'm cheering for you! And I can't wait to see you
sing!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...Thanks so much, you guys! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Follow me until the very end and beyond. ☆
Smart Falcon, taking flight! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Wooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I thought she would be over the moon seeing all
this hype before the race, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon seems to be struggling to
concentrate. Her chitchat lacks its usual zing.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's nothing! It's not like I'm worried about
anything...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: It's just... More people are coming, right?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It's still early, so... I'm sure there'll be more
people coming later.
choice_data_list: There's a lot more people here than usual.
There's a lot more people here than usual.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon's growing popularity is having an
effect on the popularity of dirt races as a whole.
In other words...
choice_data_list: Your hard work is paying off.
Your hard work is paying off.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...Haha, I'd sure be happy if that were the case. ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
At least... we did everything we could possibly do.
No stone unturned.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's almost time for the race to start, and Smart
Falcon is looking increasingly nervous.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer. How many people are there now?
choice_data_list: It's looking to be over thirty thousand now.
It's looking to be over thirty thousand now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing how fixated Smart Falcon has been on the
audience numbers, I checked them with the
organizers. I tell her how delighted the staff were.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Thirty thousand... That's unreal. And... how many
were at the Arima Kinen? Just out of curiosity.
choice_data_list: Around a hundred and ten thousand, I think.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: One hundred and... Th-that many?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I get it now. Those numbers are like... day and
night.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
The Tokyo Daishoten is the final race of the year.
It gets a lot more attention than the other dirt
races.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Plus, a bunch of my fans are here to see me this
year.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yet, despite all of that... it just doesn't compare.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suppose she feels a little disappointed in the
turnout, having just experienced the immense
scale of the Arima Kinen firsthand.
choice_data_list:
I think you should stop focusing on the
numbers.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
choice_data_list:
You can't afford to be distracted during the
race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Tokyo Daishoten hosts the strongest runners
regardless of age. Smart Falcon won't be able to
win if her eyes aren't fixed firmly on the prize.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah, you're right.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Sorry about that! I guess I'm just stressing myself
out.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I've done everything I can. There's no changing
things now.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I need to kick these thoughts to the curb and aim
for center stage!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
...Don't you worry! There's nothing on my mind
now except the center!
choice_data_list: Let's finish this year on a high note!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Right!
